current.headline_draft: A Robot in Texas Is Building Houses Out of Dirt. The Material Cost Is Zero. The Walls Don't Meet Energy Code.
revisions:
Round 1: Fixed broken HTML (premature

in 10,000 Years section), corrected wall perimeter math (was 1,100 lf → corrected to 160 ext + 150 int = ~310 lf, 2,800 sqft wall area), cost savings corrected from $190-371K to $54-105K, removed flowery sculptor metaphor for Jake voice, added robot cost caveat and wall area assumptions to limitations

last_completed.headline: Your Builder Asked the Architect a Question Over Text. Nobody Logged It. Three Months Later It Cost You $11,000.
